# WTG Knowledge Base

> Centrally managed knowledge for Solution Architecture, SDLC automation, and Agentic Workspaces.

## Context
This repository contains curated knowledge for a Google Partner Solution Architect. It is used to provide context to AI agents (Cursor, Jules, Antigravity) and as a human-readable documentation site.

## Navigation
- [GCP Patterns](docs/gcp/index.md): Standardized cloud architectures.
- [Apps Script & GWS](docs/gcp/apps-script.md): GDE patterns (McPherson, Tanaike, Hawksey).
- [ADK (Agent Development Kit)](docs/gcp/adk.md): Building high-performance agents.
- [Agentic Workspace (Bluefin)](docs/architecture/bluefin.md): Cloud-native desktop and Distrobox.
- [Enterprise Security](docs/gcp/security-extended.md): CEP and Google Flow.
- [AI Skills](docs/skills/index.md): Optimized instructions for LLMs.

## Community Resources
- [Gassypedia](https://ramblings.mcpher.com/gassypedia-2-years/): Tracking the GAS ecosystem.
- [ADK Samples](https://github.com/google/adk-samples): Official Google ADK examples.
